title: Gen TRM — Generative Extension of Tiny Recursive Model for ARC-AGI
description: A generative extension of the Tiny Recursive Model (TRM) architecture specifically optimized for ARC-AGI tasks. This repository contains proprietary VAE head architecture modifications and integrated digital signatures for ownership verification. Built on the 2025 Samsung Electronics TRM base.
notes: Proprietary modifications are Copyright (c) 2026 Akhil Kumar Kondapuram & Team. Base architecture is MIT Licensed by Samsung Electronics.
